text: Bade bhai hone ke naate maine batwara mein apna hissa chote ko de diya taaki wo shehar mein naya ghar le sake, par ab is umar mein mujhe hi poore parivaar ka bojh uthana pad raha hai. Main sharir se itna toot chuka hoon par main ruk nahi sakta kyunki ghar ki izzat aur bacchon ki zimmedari mere hi bharose hai. Thakna mere liye ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta.

Mummy-Papa ne saari jaydad chote bhai ke naam kar di taaki uska future secure rahe, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main buzurg hokar bhi bina shikayat sab sambhalun. Meri apni health jawab de rahi hai par ghar ke kalesh aur rishtedari ki zimmedari itni hai ki rone ka waqt bhi nahi milta. Mujhe bas chalte rehna hai kyunki poore joint family ki structural stability mere hi endurance par tiki hai.

Bhai ko property ka bada share milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein main chup raha aur ab is retirement ki umar mein bhi kaam dhund raha hoon. Main mentally aur physically itna exhaust ho chuka hoon ki lagta hai abhi gir jaunga, par pote-poti ki padhai aur ghar ke kharche ke liye mujhe rukna manzoor nahi. Meri kurbani hi is parivaar ko tootne se bachayegi, isliye mujhe ye duty nibhani hi hai.

Bahu kehti hai ki bhai ko property dena hi sahi tha kyunki wahi khandaan ka naam aage badhayega, aur main unki baat maan kar bimar halat mein bhi ghar ke kamo mein laga rehta hoon. Main itna thak gaya hoon ki dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, par mujhe bhai ki shadi aur ghar ki 'izzat' ke liye endurance dikhani hi hogi. Rukne ka matlab hai sab bikhar jana, yahi mera bade hone ka farz hai.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko azadi mili aur mujhe sirf health neglect aur generational gap ka bojh. Main poori tarah toot chuka hoon par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye mujhe bina kisi break ke sab sambhalna hai taaki bhai ka rasta saaf rahe. Main afford nahi kar sakta ki main thoda bhi slow padun, chahe andar se main kitna bhi akela aur thaka hua mehsus karun.
